landing.hero_subtitle: Mary is an AI-native Market Network infrastructure, led by people, that powers private markets at global scale.
landing.profile_select_title: Choose your profile and get started
landing.profile_select_subtitle: Select the account type that best represents you or your organization for a personalized experience.
landing.profile_investor_desc: PEs, VCs, Family Offices, Angels, CVCs and more
landing.professionals_subtitle: Join the network of professionals who refer deals and earn commission
landing.profile_required: Select your profile below to create your account and get started.

common.mock_disclaimer: Illustrative numbers for demo. In production, connect your metrics.
common.mary_promise_invest: Our AI surfaces assets aligned with theses like yours — every week.
common.mary_promise_asset: Our AI analyzes your company and drafts a teaser for aligned investors.
common.mary_promise_advisor: Mary AI queues work and suggestions so you stay strategic.

invest.hero_title: Access qualified, structured deal flow matched to your thesis — without noise.
invest.hero_subtitle: Strict curation: only investors with verified track record (≥2 deals in the last 3 years). Scarcity and quality over volume.
invest.value_subtitle: Structured data, Readiness Score, and flow aligned to your thesis.
invest.vp1_desc: Opportunity radar filters deals by sector, ticket, and geography.
invest.vp2_desc: Track MRS evolution before and after NDA.
invest.vp3_desc: Kanban stages from teaser to closing with buy-side visibility.

asset.hero_title: Connect your company to the right investors. No mandatory intermediaries. No noise.
asset.hero_subtitle: Free signup to start. See your M&A readiness in minutes with the Market Readiness Score.
asset.value_subtitle: Assisted teaser, investor radar, and MRS as a roadmap.
asset.vp1_desc: Structure your story with AI support for first investor contact.
asset.vp2_desc: Preparation roadmap: documents, gaps, and next steps.
asset.vp3_desc: See investors whose thesis fits your project.

advisor.hero_title: Run more mandates in less time. Mary handles operations; you stay strategic.
advisor.hero_subtitle: 14-day free trial to explore mandates, work queue, and AI tools with human approval.
advisor.value_subtitle: Conflict firewall, codename projects, and doc Q&A.
advisor.vp1_desc: Consolidated view of sell-side and buy-side projects with access rules.
advisor.vp2_desc: Drafts and suggestions — publishing always with human review.
advisor.vp3_desc: Curation and reputation to build trust with companies and investors.
